title: mesosphaerum rhabdocalyx
intro: Mesosphaerum rhabdocalyx, also known as 'Rio Grande verbena', is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum rhabdocalyx include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or used in tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
